title: Change Request
description: PROTOTYPE hand-draft. The real artifact is GENERATED from Daemar's canonical Rust types (schemars) and checked in; a test regenerates and compares, so the schema cannot drift from the types. Bounds shown here mirror PER-11.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema. Allowed but not interpreted by Daemar.

schema.description: Contract version. Exact match required; no negotiation.

id.description: Human-authored slug identifying this Change Request. Appears in the Run Record, commit trailers, and PR body.

objective.description: What the Workflow Run should achieve. Shown to the model as a Context Entry.

acceptance_criteria.description: How a human reviewer judges success. Shown to the model as Context Entries; never machine-checked by Daemar.
